attention2.ptxt: Do not damage condenser fins. If condenser fin is bent, straighten it using flat-bladed screwdriver or pliers.

s1.ptxt: Recover refrigerant from A/C system referring to “Recovery” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge:Manual Type .

attention3.ptxt: The amount of removed compressor oil must be measured to determine how much compressor oil is required for replenishment.

s1.ptxt: Remove discharge hose bolt (1) and liquid pipe bolt (2).
Disconnect discharge hose (3) and liquid pipe (4) from condenser assembly (5).

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.
Apply compressor oil to new O-ring of discharge hose and liquid pipe.

item.ptxt: Replenish specified amount of A/C compressor with compressor oil to specified amount from compressor suction side referring to “Replenishing Compressor Oil” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge:Manual Type .
Evacuate and charge A/C system referring to “Evacuation” and “Charge” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge:Manual Type .
